column1: 喉が渇かんばかりの、猛烈な暑さだった。
column2: のどがかわかんばかりの、もうれつなあつさだった。
column3: It was a fierce heat that looked as if one's throat would run dry.
column4: んばかりに (as if about to ~, looking as though it will ~)

column6: describes an extreme appearance or behavior that seems on the verge of the action; vivid resemblance to doing X
column8: んばかりに = vivid as-if on the verge of; かのようだ = as if (broader resemblance); そうに = looks like (general); たように = as if it did
